scripts.deploy: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; DEST="${HA_HACS_DIR:-$HA_HACS_PATH}"; [ -n "$DEST" ] || { echo "Set HA_HACS_DIR (or HA_HACS_PATH) in .env"; exit 1; }; rsync -av "hacs-dyson-remote.js" "$DEST/hacs-dyson-remote.js" && mkdir -p "$DEST/dist" && rsync -av "dist/hacs-dyson-remote.js" "$DEST/dist/hacs-dyson-remote.js"'
scripts.build:deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy
